declared_scope: Keep the v0.9 network stack and the Arc GPU frequency tweaks; remove only CPU C-state, governor, EPP, scheduler, and memory tuning.
hypothesis: The Arc cold-start improvement survives via the GPU frequency tweaks while most of the v0.8 idle-power cost (attributed to CPU power-state tuning) is recovered. Motivated by the 2026-06-11 screen where v0.9-network-efficient saved 3.3W but lost the entire -51% cold-start gain.
rollback_method: The full-test harness applies temporary presets and runs preset --undo before completion.
